nasb.text: A man who is laden with the guilt of human blood Will be a fugitive until death; let no one support him.

esv.text: If one is burdened with the blood of another, he will be a fugitive until death; let no one help him.

cnv.text: 背負流人血之罪的， 必逃跑至死，人不可幫助他。

ccb.text: 背负血债者必终生逃亡， 谁也不要帮他。

csbs.text: 背负杀人流血之罪的， 会一直逃亡到阴坑； 谁也不要扶持他！
